title: Corytholoma confertifolium
taxonomy: Corytholoma confertifolium is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. It belongs to the genus Corytholoma, which is a group of flowering plants. The family Celastraceae is a large and diverse group of flowering plants that are commonly known as the staff vine or bittersweet family. The Celastraceae family is further divided into several genera, with Corytholoma being one of them. The classification of Corytholoma confertifolium reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other plants in the family.
properties: Corytholoma confertifolium, a plant native to New Caledonia, has been studied for its potential therapeutic properties.
